# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "2.1"

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - "*"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization

  - name: key-auth
    service: "all"

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 1000

services:
  - name: my-service
    url: http://my-backend-server
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /api/v1
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            service: "my-service"
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 500

global_plugins:
  - name: cors
